title: European stocks poised for negative open as ceasefire optimism fades
summary: European stock markets are expected to open lower on Friday as uncertainty surrounding U.S.-Iran peace negotiations dampens investor confidence. Futures data indicates a broadly negative opening as geopolitical tensions weigh on market sentiment.
content: Futures data pointed to a broadly negative open in Europe on Friday, as uncertainty over a potential U.S.-Iran peace deal weighs on investor sentiment.

zh.title: 随着停火乐观情绪消退 欧洲股市或迎负开盘
zh.summary: 随着美伊和平谈判的不确定性打击投资者信心,欧洲股市预计周五开盘走低。期货数据表明,地缘政治紧张局势对市场情绪的压力导致大体上的负面开盘。

title: TSMC shares jump to record high as Taiwan eases single-stock investment caps for funds
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) shares reached record highs following regulatory changes that ease investment restrictions on single stocks. The milestone was bolstered by the company's strong earnings, with first-quarter profits surging 58% year-over-year.
content: TSMC, whose shares had a hit a record high on Thursday as well, last week reported a 58% increase in first-quarter profit.

zh.title: 台湾放宽单只股票投资上限 台积电股价创历史新高
zh.summary: 台湾半导体制造公司(台积电)股价在监管部门放宽单只股票投资限制后创历史新高。该公司第一季度利润同比增长58%的强劲表现进一步推动了这一里程碑。

title: China's DeepSeek releases preview of long-awaited V4 model as AI race intensifies
summary: Chinese AI company DeepSeek has unveiled a preview of its V4 large language model, escalating competition in the global artificial intelligence sector. The release marks a significant milestone for the startup in advancing its generative AI capabilities.
content: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek has released a preview version of its long awaited V4 large language model.

zh.title: 中国DeepSeek发布期待已久的V4模型预览版 AI竞争加剧
zh.summary: 中国AI公司DeepSeek推出了其V4大型语言模型预览版,加剧了全球人工智能领域的竞争。此次发布标志着这家初创公司在推进生成式AI能力方面的重要里程碑。

title: Oil rises as Iran war worries keep markets on edge with Hormuz Strait staying shut
summary: Oil prices increased amid persistent concerns about Iran and regional military tensions, despite the extension of the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire. The closure of the Hormuz Strait and geopolitical uncertainty continue to shape market dynamics.
content: Oil prices rose as investors stayed cautious despite a three-week extension of the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

zh.title: 伊朗战争担忧升级，霍尔木兹海峡关闭，油价上涨
zh.summary: 尽管以色列-黎巴嫩停火协议延长，由于伊朗和地区军事紧张局势的持续担忧，油价上升。霍尔木兹海峡关闭和地缘政治不确定性继续影响市场动态。

title: Alibaba’s Qwen AI is coming to cars, allowing drivers order food and book hotels by voice
summary: Alibaba is integrating its Qwen AI assistant into vehicles across multiple car brands, enabling drivers to order food and book hotels through voice commands. The expansion brings advanced AI capabilities to automotive systems for enhanced in-vehicle convenience.
content: Alibaba is rolling out its Qwen AI across multiple car brands, promising hands-free features like ordering meals and managing deliveries from the driver’s seat.

zh.title: 阿里巴巴通义AI进军汽车行业，驾驶员可通过语音订餐和预订酒店
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴正在将其通义AI助手集成到多个汽车品牌的车辆中，使驾驶员能够通过语音命令订购食物和预订酒店。该扩展为汽车系统带来了先进的AI功能，增强了车内便利性。

title: Japan core inflation accelerates after five months as Iran war stokes energy worries
summary: Japan's core inflation accelerated for the first time in five months to 1.8%, meeting economist expectations, as energy price concerns stemming from regional tensions persist. This metric indicates inflationary pressures continue despite earlier stabilization.
content: Government data showed the inflation figure — which strips out prices of fresh food — was in line with the 1.8% expected by economists polled by Reuters.

zh.title: 日本核心通胀五个月后加速 伊朗战争引发能源担忧
zh.summary: 日本核心通胀在五个月内首次加速至1.8%，符合经济学家预期，区域紧张局势引发的能源价格担忧持续存在。该指标表明尽管早前有所稳定，通胀压力仍在继续。

title: Here’s how much money the 2026 NFL draft picks will make — and who’s at risk of losing millions
summary: Three players in the 2026 NFL draft will command over $50 million in contracts while others risk substantial financial losses based on draft position and negotiation outcomes. Draft placement dramatically affects professional football earning potential.
content: Three NFL players will make over $50 million in tonight’s draft

zh.title: 2026年NFL选秀新秀将赚多少钱——以及谁可能损失数百万
zh.summary: 2026年NFL选秀中三名球员将获得超过5000万美元的合同，而其他球员则面临因选秀位置和谈判结果而造成的重大经济损失。选秀位置大幅影响职业足球的收入潜力。

title: US soldier charged after winning $400,000 betting on removal of Maduro
summary: A U.S. soldier has been charged for allegedly using classified information to make betting trades on Polymarket, reportedly winning $400,000 in wagers related to Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro's potential removal. The Department of Justice alleges the soldier, Gannon Ken Van Dyke, exploited privileged access to non-public information.
content: Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly made trades on Polymarket on the basis of classified information, the justice department says.

zh.title: 美国士兵因利用机密信息下注40万美元预测马杜罗下台而被控
zh.summary: 一名美国士兵因涉嫌利用机密信息在Polymarket平台进行赌博交易而被指控，据报道在与委内瑞拉领导人尼古拉斯·马杜罗可能下台相关的赌注中赢得了40万美元。司法部指控该士兵甘农·肯·范·戴克利用了非公开信息的特权访问权限。

title: Why Intel’s stock is on track for a historic surge after earnings
summary: Intel stock appears poised for its strongest post-earnings performance on record, potentially exceeding its 2000 peak as demand for processors accelerates during a "CPU renaissance." The surge represents a significant turnaround for the historically struggling chipmaker.
content: Intel shares could see their best post-earnings performance on record and finally surpass their 2000 closing high amid a “CPU renaissance.”

zh.title: 为什么英特尔股票有望在财报后创历史新高
zh.summary: 英特尔股票似乎准备创造历史上最强的财报后表现纪录，随着"CPU文艺复兴"期间处理器需求加速，可能超过其2000年的高点。这次上升代表了这家历史上一直苦苦挣扎的芯片制造商的重大转折。

title: Cheap stock options suggest a big post-earnings swing next week for Meta and other tech titans
summary: Options market pricing suggests investors may be underestimating potential dramatic stock price swings when major tech companies like Meta report earnings next week. The disconnect between options prices and historical volatility signals possible significant trading opportunities.
content: Wall Street is underestimating a potential price explosion in next week’s tech-stock earnings reports.

zh.title: 廉价股票期权预示Meta等科技巨头下周财报后会出现大幅波动
zh.summary: 期权市场定价表明，当Meta等大型科技公司下周公布财报时，投资者可能低估了潜在的剧烈股价波动。期权价格与历史波动率之间的脱节预示可能存在重大交易机会。
